title: Panda weapon editor 2.1 customized
description: This a new and customized version of panda weapon editor
body:
It modifies the damage of certain guns like the snipers this helps the player wielding the sniper to one shot an enemy(headshot)
It is a fun extension to the modern warfare cubed mod
Both dependencies are needed just like the other version

All credits goes to the owner paneedah
Orginal link
https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-warfare-cubed/version/0.1-Dev-14
